subcodes.first_line: The mention of thee reached the precincts of the Prison. Praise be to God that, through His Most Great Bounty and Supreme Grace, thou hast attained unto the recognition of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت در ساحت سجن مذکور آمد لله الحمد بعنایت کبری و فضل اعظم که عرفان حق و
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
